Modify the Last Conditional Statement
The last conditional statement in the function should be modified to return the substring from the current position to the end of the file if no newline character is found. This can be achieved by changing the return statement to return js.substring(pos) when js.indexOf('\n', pos) == -1.

Check for the Last Line Before Returning Null
Before returning null, the function should check if the requested line is the last line in the file. If it is, the function should return the remaining content in the file. This can be achieved by adding a conditional statement to check if the next newline character is -1, indicating that we have reached the end of the file.
